summary: Full testing completed for Mount View Hotel Skardu SEO/theme overhaul + AI chatbot. All 17 test items PASSED. Hero has single 'Book on WhatsApp' CTA, no sticky Book Now button, WhatsApp green icon in bottom-right, AI chatbot toggle in bottom-left with greeting and accurate PKR pricing responses, counters section (5000+, 20+, 8+, 4.8), video section, FAQ expandable items, Google Map iframe, 3 guest review cards with stars, emerald/gold theme applied to navbar and footer.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Chat API tested with room rates, airport distance, facilities, Deosai distance, session persistence. Frontend verified: hero single WhatsApp CTA, chatbot toggle/window/close, counters section, video section, reviews with stars, FAQ expandable, Google Map iframe, final CTA WhatsApp button. Theme colors: navbar emerald with gold Book Now, footer emerald (rgb(14,47,47)). No sticky Book Now button present (correctly removed).

tests_executed.test: Hero has only ONE booking CTA - 'Book on WhatsApp' button
No 'Book Now' sticky button in bottom-right corner
WhatsApp green icon visible in bottom-right
Chatbot toggle button visible in bottom-left corner
Clicking chatbot toggle opens chat window
Chatbot displays greeting message 'Welcome to Mountview Hotel'
Chatbot responds to 'What are your room rates?' with accurate PKR pricing
Final CTA section has single 'Book on WhatsApp Now' button
Video section renders with video player
FAQ section with expandable items works
Guest reviews section shows 3 review cards with stars
Navbar has emerald background with gold Book Now button

backend_tests_results.test_chat_facilities_response: PASSED - Returns restaurant, parking, Wi-Fi, etc.
backend_tests_results.test_chat_session_persistence: PASSED - Session ID persists across messages

chatbot_verification.model: OpenAI gpt-4o-mini via Emergent LLM key
chatbot_verification.error_handling: Graceful - falls back to reception contact

theme_verification.navbar: Emerald background with gold Book Now button
